ValidationRule.description: Enforces valid status transitions. Cannot jump from draft directly to invoiced/completed without intermediate states.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Status__c), OR( AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "draft"), NOT(OR(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "posted"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "quoted"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "cancelled")))), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "posted"), NOT(OR(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "quoted"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "tendered"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "cancelled")))), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "quoted"), NOT(OR(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "tendered"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "posted"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "cancelled")))), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "tendered"), NOT(OR(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "accepted"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "cancelled")))), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "accepted"), NOT(OR(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "dispatched"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "cancelled")))), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "dispatched"), NOT(OR(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "in_transit"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "cancelled")))), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "in_transit"), NOT(OR(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "delivered"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "exception"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "cancelled")))), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "delivered"), NOT(OR(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "pod_captured"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "exception"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "cancelled")))), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "pod_captured"), NOT(OR(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "invoiced"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "exception"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "disputed")))), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "invoiced"), NOT(OR(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "settled"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "disputed")))), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "settled"), NOT(OR(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "completed"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "disputed")))) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Invalid status transition. Please follow the workflow: Draft → Posted/Quoted → Tendered → Accepted → Dispatched → In Transit → Delivered → POD Captured → Invoiced → Settled → Completed.
